name_en: Original leather with counter gift box 5BB117: Miu Miu New Patchwork Briefcase, heavy handmade, made of multiple leather splices. The bold innovative design perfectly interprets Miu's unique attitude of unconstrained, casual, and inclusive lifestyle. This bag is cool, capturing a refined multifunctional design that blends men's and women's elements. Casual and lazy, natural and free-spirited, full of personality. Super large capacity and lightweight. New canvas lining, popular globally, loved by fashion bloggers and celebrities. Size: 34X23X12cm (with original packaging)
